mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-order-returnist-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundReturnIstList - 반품입고 검수이상 처리 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , SOHDKEY AS ORHDKEY , CUSTORDNO , WBLNO , ICKEY , ISTIBQTY , ISTRETSHIPQTY , ISTDSPSQTY , PRCSISTCONT , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_ICKEYIST_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PRCSYN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(RCVDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

/* wms-inbound-order-returnist-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbretWblnoList - 반품 운송장 내역 조회 */ SELECT WBL.CTKEY , WBL.OWKEY , WBL.IBHDKEY , WBL.SEQNO , WBL.WBLDIVCD , WBL.WBLNO , WBL.WBLPRGRSTATUSCD , IH.CUSTORDNO , IH.EXTORDERKEY , IH.RIPRGRSTATUSCD , IH.UPDATEDATE FROM TWORK_INFO_IBRET_WBLNO WBL INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_HD IH ON WBL.CTKEY = IH.CTKEY AND WBL.OWKEY = IH.OWKEY AND WBL.IBHDKEY = IH.IBHDKEY WHERE WBL.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WBL.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WBL.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND WBL.WBLNO = #{wblno}
